title: The Bride of Roshtaria
overview: Jinnai gains control of the demon goddess Ifurita, and Makoto and Roshtaria face imminent attack, leading Princess Rune to consider using the ancient superweapon, the Eye of God.

title: The Awakening of Kalia
overview: Jinnai has gained control over demon goddess Ifurita, and Makoto and Roshtaria face imminent attack. Princess Rune has no option other than unleashing the ancient superweapon known as the Eye of God. But her convoy is attacked by what appear to be two new demon gods.

title: Ifurita, Farewell to Destiny
overview: The plan to follow the sages leads to a disastrous outcome, and Nanami's appearance reveals Makoto's charade, while the episode also features the introduction of cat armor and Nanami's newfound superpower.

title: Promise for Reunion
overview: The group faces a new challenge as they attempt to reach the location of the Eye of God, with Ifurita's help, while also dealing with the Phantom Tribe's sabotage and the potential for the weapon to go out of control.
